title: Chat Moderator
description: ChatModerator is a fast, profanity filtering plugin for Minecraft servers. Keep your community clean without the overhead of heavy local word-lists.
body:
# 🛡️ Standard Chat Moderation Plugin

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.x-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-PaperMC-blueviolet?style=for-the-badge&logo=papermc&logoColor=white)
![Performance](https://img.shields.io/badge/Performance-Blazing%20Fast-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=speedtest&logoColor=white)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue?style=for-the-badge)

---

### ✨ Overview
A **lightweight**, **high-performance** chat moderation solution for Minecraft servers. Powered by [ProfanityAPI](https://www.profanity.dev/), this plugin keeps your chat clean **without the use of slow AI**.

---

## 📥 Download & Support

The full version of **Chat Moderation** is available on [**Modrinth**](https://modrinth.com/project/uK69wmhs). If you need help or want to stay updated, join our [**Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/KD3KWN5f9G). If you enjoy using this plugin, please consider giving it a **star** or a **review**! Your support helps keep this project free and updated.


---

## ⚡ Why Use This?

*   🚀 **No AI, Just Speed**: Uses advanced algorithms instead of heavy AI models, ensuring **instant** message processing with zero lag.
*   ⚡ **Ultra-Low Latency**: Your players won't even notice their messages are being checked.
*   🧠 **Smart Filtering**: Detects profanity effectively, even when users try to be clever with symbols or spacing.
*   🔧 **Configurable Strictness**: Adjust the sensitivity of the filter to suit your server's needs.
*   🛠️ **Zero-Maintenance**: No need to maintain local ban lists; the API handles it all.

---

## 📜 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/chatmoderator reload` | 🔄 Reloads the configuration file | `chatmoderator.reload` |
| `/chatmoderator status` | 📡 Checks API connectivity and version | `chatmoderator.admin` |

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

The `config.yml` allows you to customize the plugin's behavior.

```yaml
# ProfanityAPI Configuration
api-url: "https://vector.profanity.dev"

# Messages
profanity-blocked: "&cYour message was blocked because it contains profanity!"
api-error: "&eModeration service is currently unavailable. Allowing message."

# Minimum score to block (0.0 to 1.0)
# Lower is stricter.
# 1.0 = High probability of profanity
# 0.9 = Recommended default
min-block-score: 0.9
```

---

## 📥 Installation

1.  **Download** the `ChatModerator.jar` file.
2.  **Upload** it to your server's `plugins` folder.
3.  **Restart** your server to generate the configuration files.
4.  **Edit** `plugins/ChatModerator/config.yml` to customize your settings.
5.  Type `/chatmoderator reload` or restart your server to apply changes.

---

## 💎 Credits

*   👨‍💻 **Development**: [Obsyron](https://www.obsyron.com)
*   🌐 **API**: Powered by [ProfanityAPI](https://www.profanity.dev/)
